analysis.reasoning: Core message: Cites Premier Li stating that peace, development, cooperation, and exchange are the prevailing trend; regardless of external changes, China will open wider and advance in opening-up. Evaluation: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) — Not present; no criticism of the West or victimhood framing. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — Yes; emphasizes peaceful development, cooperation, openness to the world, portraying China as cooperative and beneficial internationally. CH3 (epic history/adversities) — Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values, domestically framed) — Partially adjacent but not applicable; the tweet focuses on international openness rather than advocating China's domestic political system or values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) — Implicit positivity, but no concrete claim of domestic achievement or leadership; not enough to qualify. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
